/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librs_control__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o librs_control__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/rs_control__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/rs_control/msg/detail/sine_wave_parameters__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tue/rs_control/build/rs_control:/opt/ros/humble/lib: librs_control__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
